name: Stackable Gold Band
description: A smooth, high-polished 18kt gold band — the foundation of any ring stack. Wear it alone for quiet confidence or layer two or three for a curated, editorial look. Available in sizes 5–14.
careInstructions: Remove before exercising or household work. Store in the provided pouch.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
